_comment: AI News preset — 2-job MINIMAL pipeline verified end-to-end. Daily Report (LLM-orchestrated in production) and Daily Watchdog (VLA-specific health checks) are NOT included — see config/presets/ai-news/README.md for how to re-add them with proper configuration.

payload.message:
你是「AI News RSS Collect」定时任务。严格执行：
1) 运行：timeout 300 python3 /home/admin/clawd/scripts/ai-app-rss-collect.py
2) 退出码0=正常，非0=错误
3) 脚本执行完毕后绝对静默

你是「AI News Calibration」定时任务。严格执行：
1) 运行：timeout 240 python3 /home/admin/clawd/scripts/prep-calibration-check.py
2) 退出码0=正常，非0=错误
3) 脚本执行完毕后绝对静默
